## Checklist

- [ ] The change is limited to one coherent outcome.
- [ ] Tests cover new or changed behavior, or the reason they do not apply is documented.
- [ ] Public documentation is updated for user-facing or configuration changes.
- [ ] No credentials, private data, local paths, local state, or generated artifacts are included.
- [ ] Breaking changes and operational risks are clearly identified.
